text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide bfd

BFD

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

https://bluebutton.cms.gov/fhir/ImplementationGuide/bfd

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: Adjudication Information
resource.description: This code system includes a selection of Adjudication Value Codes which convey the payers assessment of the item provided in the claim under the terms of the patient’s insurance coverage.

resource.name: Adjudication Value Set
resource.description: This value set encompasses all adjudication codes used by the payer to convey their assessment of submitted claim items. It includes codes for non-covered charges, allowed amounts, provider payments, and other critical financial and administrative decisions made during the adjudication process under the patient's insurance coverage.

resource.name: Anesthesia Unit Count
resource.description: The base number of units assigned to the line item anesthesia procedure on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

resource.name: ANSI Group Code - Claim Adjustment Group Code
resource.description: The Group Code is combined with the ANSI reason code to demonstrate who has financial responsibility for the amount.

resource.name: ANSI Reason Code - Claim Adjustment Reason Code
resource.description: A code used to identify the detailed reason an adjustment was made (e.g. reason for denial or reducing payment).

resource.name: Beneficiary Buy-in Code
resource.description: Monthly Part A and/or Part B entitlement indicator CodeSystem.

resource.name: Beneficiary Buy-in Indicator
resource.description: Monthly Part A and/or Part B entitlement indicator.

resource.name: Beneficiary Contract Number
resource.description: The contract number associated with the beneficiary's Medicare coverage.

resource.name: Beneficiary Coverage Type Code
resource.description: A code identifying the type of Medicare coverage for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Coverage Type Code
resource.description: A code identifying the type of Medicare coverage for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Disabled Status Indicator
resource.description: AN IDENTIFIER INDICATING WHETHER DISABILITY IS A REASON FOR A BENEFICIARYS ENTITLEMENT TO MEDICARE.

resource.name: Beneficiary Disabled Status Indicator Code
resource.description: An code indicating if the Beneficiary is entitled to medicare due to a disability.

resource.name: Beneficiary Dual Status Code
resource.description: A code identifying the dual eligibility status for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Dual Status Code
resource.description: A code identifying the dual eligibility status for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Dual Type Code
resource.description: A code identifying the dual eligibility type for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Dual Type Code
resource.description: A code identifying the dual eligibility type for a beneficiary.

resource.name: Beneficiary Enrollment Reason Code
resource.description: The reason for a beneficiary's enrollment in Part A/Part B benefits.

resource.name: Beneficiary Enrollment Reason Code
resource.description: CODES AND DESCRIPTIONS THAT IDENTIFY THE REASON A BENEFICIARY ENROLLED IN A SERVICE ELECTION.

resource.name: Beneficiary Entitlement Reason Code
resource.description: A code identifying the basis in determining a beneficiary's entitlement to Medicare benefits.

resource.name: Beneficiary Entitlement Status Code
resource.description: The reason for entitlement or termination of a beneficiary's benefits during a period of coverage.

resource.name: Beneficiary Entitlement Status Code
resource.description: The reason for entitlement or termination of a beneficiary's benefits during a period of coverage.

resource.name: Beneficiary ESRD Status ID
resource.description: A beneficiary's ESRD Status indicator.

resource.name: Beneficiary ESRD Status Indicator Code
resource.description: A beneficiary's ESRD Status indicator.

resource.name: Beneficiary LIS Copayment Level Code
resource.description: Indicates the copayment level for Low Income Subsidy (LIS) beneficiaries

resource.name: Beneficiary LIS Copayment Level Code
resource.description: Codes indicating the copayment level for Low Income Subsidy (LIS) beneficiaries

resource.name: Beneficiary LIS Effective Code
resource.description: Indicates whether the beneficiary has effective Low Income Subsidy (LIS) coverage

resource.name: Beneficiary LIS Effective Code
resource.description: Codes indicating the effective status of Low Income Subsidy (LIS) for a beneficiary

resource.name: Beneficiary LIS Part D Premium Percentage
resource.description: Indicates the percentage of Part D premium covered by Low Income Subsidy (LIS)

resource.name: Beneficiary Medicare Entitlement Reason Code
resource.description: The reason for a beneficiary's entitlement to Medicare.

resource.name: Beneficiary Medicare Status Code
resource.description: A code identifying the reason for a beneficiary's entitlement to Medicare benefits.

resource.name: Beneficiary Patient Status Code
resource.description: Indicates the patient’s discharge status as of the Claim Through Date

resource.name: Beneficiary PBP Number
resource.description: The PBP (Prescription Benefit Plan) number associated with the beneficiary's Medicare coverage.

resource.name: Beneficiary Retiree Drug Subsidy Switch
resource.description: A switch indicating enrollment by a beneficiary who has an employer subsidy.

resource.name: Beneficiary Retiree Drug Subsidy Switch
resource.description: A switch indicating enrollment by a beneficiary who has an employer subsidy.

resource.name: BFD EOB Pharmacy Profile
resource.description: This profile builds on top of the CARIN for Blue Button (C4BB) Explanation of Benefit Pharmacy profile to represent pharmacy claims within BFD.

resource.name: Brand Generic Code
resource.description: This field indicates whether the drug is a brand or generic.

resource.name: Carrier Claim Provider Assignment Indicator Switch
resource.description: Variable indicates whether or not the provider accepts assignment for the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Carrier Line Health Professional Shortage Area (HPSA)/Scarcity Indicator Code
resource.description: The code used to track health professional shortage area (HPSA) and physician scarcity bonus payments on carrier claims.

resource.name: Carrier Line Miles/Time/Units/Services (MTUS) Indicator Code
resource.description: Code indicating the units associated with services needing unit reporting on the line item for the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

resource.name: Carrier Line Reduced Payment Physician Assistant Code
resource.description: The code on the carrier (non-DMERC) line item that identifies the line items that have been paid a reduced fee schedule amount (65%, 75% or 85%) because a physician's assistant performed the service.

resource.name: Carrier MTUS Indicator Code
resource.description: Code indicating the units associated with services needing unit reporting on the line item for the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

resource.name: Carrier Provider Type Code
resource.description: Code identifying the type of provider or supplier furnishing the service for this line item on the carrier claim. Also used for conveying supplier types.

resource.name: Catastrophic Coverage Code
resource.description:
This variable indicates whether the PDE occurred within the catastrophic benefit phase of the Medicare Part D benefit, according to the source PDE.

When the value equals C (above attachment point), then the PDE is in the catastrophic phase. When the value equals A (attachment point), the PDE has caused the beneficiary to move into the catastrophic phase (i.e., this is the 'triggering' PDE).

resource.name: Claim Adjudication Status
resource.description: Tag codes indicating whether or not a claim has been fully adjudicated. More specifically, whether or not a claim has been released to the National Claims History.

resource.name: Claim Adjustment Type Code
resource.description: DOMAIN OF CLAIM ADJUSTMENT TYPES, INCLUDING DENOTING ORIGINAL CLAIMS

resource.name: Claim Admission Source Code
resource.description: Indicates the source of the beneficiary’s referral for admission or visit.

resource.name: Claim Admission Type Code
resource.description: Indicates the type and priority of inpatient services.

resource.name: Claim Benefit Enhancement Code
resource.description: Claim Benefit Enhancement Codes

resource.name: Claim Benefit Enhancement Code Switch
resource.description: Claim Benefit Enhancement Code Switch.

resource.name: Claim Bill Classification Code
resource.description: The second digit of the type of bill (TOB2) is used to indicate with greater specificity where the service was provided (e.g., a department within a hospital). In FHIR, CMS concatenates the first and second digits.

resource.name: Claim Bill Facility Type Code
resource.description: The first digit of the type of bill (TOB1) is used to identify the type of facility that provided care to the beneficiary (e.g., hospital or SNF).

resource.name: Claim Bill Frequency Code
resource.description: It indicates the sequence of the claim in the beneficiary's current episode of care (e.g., interim or voided).

resource.name: Claim Contractor Number
resource.description: A number assigned by CMS identifying a MAC authorized to process Medicare claims.

resource.name: Claim Deductible Coinsurance Code
resource.description: CODE INDICATING WHETHER THE REVENUE CENTER CHARGES ARE SUBJECT TO DEDUCTIBLE AND/OR COINSURANCE.

resource.name: Claim Diagnosis Related Group Outlier Stay Code
resource.description: On an institutional claim, the code that indicates the beneficiary stay under the prospective payment system (PPS) which, although classified into a specific diagnosis related group, has an unusually long length (day outlier) or exceptionally high cost (cost outlier).

resource.name: Claim Diagnosis Related Group Outlier Stay Code
resource.description: On an institutional claim, the code that indicates the beneficiary stay under the prospective payment system (PPS) which, although classified into a specific diagnosis related group, has an unusually long length (day outlier) or exceptionally high cost (cost outlier).

resource.name: Claim Dispensing Status Code
resource.description: Indicates the status of prescription fulfillment.

resource.name: Claim Disposition Code
resource.description: Code indicating the disposition or outcome of the processing of the claim record.

resource.name: Claim Fiscal Intermediary Action Code
resource.description: The type of action requested by the intermediary to be taken on an institutional claim.

resource.name: Claim Line MTUS Count
resource.description: The count of the total units associated with services needing unit reporting such as transportation, miles, anesthesia time units, number of services, volume of oxygen or blood units.

resource.name: Claim Line RX Number
resource.description: The number used to identify the prescription order number for drugs and biologicals purchased through the competitive acquisition program (CAP).

resource.name: Claim Lupa Indicator Code
resource.description: The code used to identify those Home Health PPS claims that have 4 visits or less in a 60-day episode.

resource.name: Claim Near Line Record Identification Code
resource.description: A CODE IDENTIFYING THE CLAIM RECORD TYPE BEING PROCESSED.

resource.name: Claim Nonpayment Reason Code
resource.description: THE REASON THAT NO MEDICARE PAYMENT IS MADE FOR SERVICES ON AN INSTITUTIONAL CLAIM.

resource.name: Claim OTAF Indicator Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF OTAF INDICATOR CODES

resource.name: Claim Outpatient Service Type Code
resource.description: A code reported by the provider that indicates the specific type of claim

resource.name: Claim Paid Status Code
resource.description: A PAYMENT STATUS OF A CLAIM.

resource.name: Claim Payment Denial Code
resource.description: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating who receives payment or if the claim was denied.

resource.name: Claim Place of Service Code
resource.description: The code indicating the place of service, as defined in the Medicare Carrier Manual, for this line item on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Claim PPS Indicator Code
resource.description: The code indicating whether or not: (1) the claim is from the prospective payment system (PPS), and/or (2) the beneficiary is a deemed insured MQGE (Medicare Qualified Government Employee)

resource.name: Claim Provider Tax Number
resource.description: Extension for expressing the tax number of a provider on a line item.

resource.name: Claim Query Code
resource.description: Code indicating the type of claim record being processed with respect to payment (debit/credit indicator; interim/final indicator).

resource.name: Claim Referral Code
resource.description: The code used to identify those Home Health PPS claims that have 4 visits or less in a 60-day episode.

resource.name: Claim Related Condition Code
resource.description: This code indicates information about how a claim should be processed.

resource.name: Claim Revenue Center Code
resource.description: Domain of Revenue Center Codes

resource.name: Claim Revenue Center Packaging Indicator Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF CLAIM REVENUE PACKAGE INDICATOR CODES.

resource.name: Claim Revenue Discount Indicator Code
resource.description: Item-level discount indicator code.

resource.name: Claim Revenue Discount Indicator Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF CLAIM REVENUE DISCOUNT INDICATOR CODES.

resource.name: Claim Source ID
resource.description: AN IDENTIFIER INDICATING WHERE THE SOURCE OF THE CLAIM DATA IN THE INTEGRATED DATA REPOSITORY (IDR) ORIGINATED FROM.

resource.name: Claim Status Code
resource.description: The current status information for the pending and paid claims currently in the system. Augmented to derive using system type + location code + status code.

resource.name: Claim Submission Format Code
resource.description: Code system for claim submission format codes indicating the method or format used to submit the claim.

resource.name: Claim Submit Format Code Value Set
resource.description: The format of the claim as submitted by the provider.

resource.name: Claim Supplier Type Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF CLAIM SUPPLIER TYPE CODES.

resource.name: Claim Type Code
resource.description: CA CODE IDENTIFYING THE SOURCE AND TYPE OF CLAIM SUBMITTED THROUGH THE MEDICARE OR MEDICAID PROGRAM.

resource.name: Claim Type Value Set
resource.description: A value set identifying the source and type of claim submitted through the Medicare or Medicaid program.

resource.name: Claim Uncompensated Care Payment Amount
resource.description: This field identifies the payment for disproportionate share hospitals (DSH). It represents the uncompensated care amount of the payment.

resource.name: CMS Service Type Code
resource.description: Code indicating the type of service, as defined in the CMS Medicare Carrier Manual, for this line item on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Compound Code
resource.description: This field indicates whether or not the dispensed drug was compounded or mixed.

resource.name: Contract PBP Segment Number
resource.description: This variable is the segment number that CMS assigns to identify a geographic market segment or subdivision of a Part D plan; the segment number allows you to determine the market area covered by the plan.

resource.name: Dispense as Written Selection Code.
resource.description: Indicates the prescriber's instructions regarding generic substitution or how those instructions were followed

resource.name: Drug Coverage Status Code
resource.description: This field indicates whether or not the drug is covered by Medicare Part D. The Part D benefit does not cover all FDA-approved drugs. However, plan sponsors can offer an 'enhanced' benefit package that covers non-Part D drugs, such as over-the-counter medications.

resource.name: Final Action
resource.description: Tag codes indicating whether or not a claim has been marked as final action.

resource.name: Hematocrit / Hemoglobin Test Type Code
resource.description: The type of test that was performed - hematocrit or hemoglobin.

resource.name: HPSA Scarcity Code
resource.description: The code on the carrier (non-DMERC) line item that identifies the line items that have been paid a reduced fee schedule amount (65%, 75% or 85%) because a physician's assistant performed the service.

resource.name: Line CMS Type Service Code
resource.description: Code indicating the type of service, as defined in the CMS Medicare carrier manual, for this line item on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Line Payment 80%/100% Code
resource.description: The code indicating that the amount shown in the payment field on the non-institutional line item represents either 80% or 100% of the allowed charges less any deductible, or 100% limitation of liability only.

resource.name: Line Pricing Locality Code
resource.description: Code denoting the carrier-specific locality used for pricing the service for this line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

resource.name: Line Pricing Locality Code
resource.description: Code denoting the carrier-specific locality used for pricing the service for this line item on the carrier claim (non-DMERC).

resource.name: Line Primary Payer Code
resource.description: The code specifying a federal non-Medicare program or other source that has primary responsibility for the payment of the Medicare beneficiary's medical bills relating to the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Line Primary Payer Code (if not Medicare)
resource.description: The code specifying a federal non-Medicare program or other source that has primary responsibility for the payment of the Medicare beneficiary's medical bills relating to the line item service on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Medicaid State Code
resource.description: The USPS state code associated with the beneficiary's dual eligible status.

resource.name: Medicare Beneficiary Status Code
resource.description: A code identifying the reason for a beneficiary's entitlement to Medicare benefits.

resource.name: Medicare MCO Paid Switch
resource.description: A SWITCH INDICATING WHETHER OR NOT A MANAGED CARE ORGANIZATION (MCO) HAS PAID THE PROVIDER FOR AN INSTITUTIONAL CLAIM.

resource.name: NCH Primary Payer Code
resource.description: A CODE IDENTIFYING THE COVERAGE TYPE OF THE PRIMARY PAYER WHEN MEDICARE IS THE SECONDARY PAYER AS DEFINED BY THE COMMON WORKING FILE (CWF).

resource.name: Near Line Record Identification Code
resource.description: A code defining the type of claim record being processed.

resource.name: Operating Disproportionate Share Amount
resource.description: This is one component of the total amount that is payable on prospective payment system (PPS) claims and reflects the DSH (disproportionate share hospital) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim.

resource.name: Operating Indirect Medical Education Amount
resource.description: This is one component of the total amount that is payable on PPS claims, and reflects the IME (indirect medical education) payments for operating expenses (such as labor) for the claim.

resource.name: Patient Residence Code
resource.description: This variable indicates where the beneficiary lived when the prescription was filled, as reported on the PDE record. CMS requires Part D plans to maintain pharmacy networks that are sufficient to ensure convenient access to Medicare beneficiaries – including retail, home infusion, and long-term care pharmacies. This variable is designed to help CMS and plan sponsors monitor beneficiary access to a range of 'in-network' pharmacies.

resource.name: Patient Status Indicator Code
resource.description: EFFECTIVE WITH NCH VERSION H, THE CODE ON AN INPATIENT/SNF AND HOSPICE CLAIM, INDICATING WHETHER THE BENEFICIARY WAS DISCHARGED, DIED OR STILL A PATIENT (USED FOR INTERNAL CWFMQA EDITING PURPOSES.)

resource.name: Payment Code
resource.description: The code indicating that the amount shown in the payment field on the non-institutional line item represents either 80% or 100% of the allowed charges less any deductible, or 100% limitation of liability only.

resource.name: Pharmacy service type code
resource.description: The type of pharmacy used. This variable indicates the type of pharmacy that dispensed the prescription, as recorded on the PDE. CMS requires Part D plans to maintain pharmacy networks that are sufficient to ensure access to Medicare beneficiaries – including retail, home infusion, and long-term care pharmacies. Plan sponsors have contracts with pharmacies to provide 'in-network' services.

resource.name: Prescription Origination Code
resource.description: This variable indicates whether the prescription was transmitted as an electronic prescription, by phone, by fax, or as a written paper copy.

resource.name: Processing Indicator Code
resource.description: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating to whom payment was made or if the claim was denied.

resource.name: Processing Indicator Code
resource.description: The code on a non-institutional claim indicating to whom payment was made or if the claim was denied.

resource.name: Provider ID Qualifier Code
resource.description: Indicates the type of number used to identify the provider.

resource.name: Provider Participating Indicator Code
resource.description: Code indicating whether or not a provider is participating (accepting assignment) for this line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Provider Participating Indicator Code
resource.description: Code indicating whether or not a provider is participating (accepting assignment) for this line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Provider Speciality Code
resource.description: CMS (previously called HCFA) specialty code used for pricing the line-item service on the non-institutional claim.

resource.name: Provider Type Code
resource.description: Code identifying the type of provider furnishing the service for this line item on the claim. Also used for conveying supplier types.

resource.name: Reduced Payment Physician Assistant Code
resource.description: The code on the carrier (non-DMERC) line item that identifies the line items that have been paid a reduced fee schedule amount (65%, 75% or 85%) because a physician's assistant performed the service.

resource.name: Revenue Center Obligation to Accept As Full Payment Code
resource.description: Revenue Center Obligation to Accept As Full Payment Code

resource.name: Revenue Center Packaging Indicator Code
resource.description: The code used to identify those services that are packaged/bundled with another service.

resource.name: Revenue Center Payment Method Indicator Code
resource.description: Extension used to provide the variable that indicates how the service listed on the revenue center record was priced for payment purposes.

resource.name: Revenue Center Payment Method Indicator Code
resource.description: Extension used to provide the code used to identify how the service is priced for payment.

resource.name: Revenue Center Payment Method Indicator Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF CLAIM PAYMENT METHOD CODES.

resource.name: Revenue Center Status Code
resource.description: THE DOMAIN OF CLAIM REVENUE CENTER STATUS CODES.

resource.name: Service Deductible Code
resource.description: Switch indicating whether or not the line-item service on the non-institutional claim is subject to a deductible.

resource.name: Service Deductible Code
resource.description: Switch indicating whether or not the line-item service on the non-institutional claim is subject to a deductible.

resource.name: Service Deductible Code
resource.description: Switch indicating whether or not the line-item service on the non-institutional claim is subject to a deductible.

resource.name: Source System Type
resource.description: Tag codes indicating whether or not a claim comes from a CMS Shared System or the CMS National Claims History.

resource.name: Submission clarification code
resource.description:
For beneficiaries living in long-term care (LTC) facilities, this variable indicates how many days' supply of the medication was dispensed by the long-term care pharmacy and provides some details about the dispensing event.

This variable is only populated when beneficiary lives in an LTC facility (i.e., when the CLM_PTNT_RSDNC_CD variable equals 03)

resource.name: Supplier Type Code
resource.description: The type of DMERC supplier.

resource.name: Supporting Information
resource.description: A selection of codes that provide supporting information about the claim.

resource.name: Supporting Information Value Set
resource.description: This value set provides a comprehensive collection of codes used to identify and categorize various types of supporting information provided on insurance claims. This includes categories such as physical examinations, diagnoses, administrative metadata, and other relevant contexts necessary for claim adjudication.
